title: Gently Smoked Saudi Arabian Lamb Tagine
description: A cultured and snappy Saudi Arabian dish featuring lamb, tinned tomatoes, and smoked spices, cooked to perfection in a ceramic tagine.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor or oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the lamb pieces, smoked paprika, cumin, coriander, salt, and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in the ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the lamb mixture to the tagine and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the tinned tomatoes to the tagine and stir to combine.
Cover the tagine and transfer to the preheated tandoor or oven.
Cook for 2 hours, or until the lamb is tender and the sauce has thickened.
Remove the tagine from the heat and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
